summary.en: A try-before-you-buy rental service for consumer electronics.
summary.zh: 消費性電子產品的「先試後買」租借服務。

highlight.en: Lumoid let shoppers rent gadgets like cameras and wearables to test them at home before committing to a purchase.
highlight.zh: Lumoid 讓消費者在購買前可先租借相機、穿戴裝置等電子產品，在家實際試用後再決定是否購買。

summary.en: Social analytics platform that makes sense of online conversation for brands.
summary.zh: 為品牌解析線上對話的社群分析平台。

highlight.en: DataRank monitored online conversation for Fortune 100 brands using its own matching language, Fizzle, before being acquired by SimplyMeasured.
highlight.zh: DataRank 以自家比對語言 Fizzle 為財星百大品牌監測線上對話，後被 SimplyMeasured 收購。

summary.en: A supportive community app for sharing fitness and weight-loss progress.
summary.zh: 分享健身與減重進度的互助社群應用程式。

highlight.en: Weilos let dieters post lined-up progress photos and share body transformations on a newsfeed to motivate and support one another.
highlight.zh: Weilos 讓減重者拍攝對齊的進度照並在動態牆分享身材轉變，彼此激勵與支持。

summary.en: A marketplace for direct commercial real estate investing.
summary.zh: 直接投資商業不動產的市場平台。

highlight.en: RealCrowd let investors pool money to invest directly in commercial real estate alongside seasoned operators, removing traditional barriers to entry.
highlight.zh: RealCrowd 讓投資人集資與資深營運方共同直接投資商業不動產，破除傳統的進入門檻。

summary.en: An online marketplace for used industrial equipment and spare parts.
summary.zh: 二手工業設備與零件的線上市場平台。

highlight.en: Asseta brings transparency and price discovery to the offline, broker-driven market for used manufacturing equipment, where over $100B is spent annually.
highlight.zh: Asseta 為每年逾千億美元、仰賴中間商的二手製造設備市場帶來透明度與價格發現機制。

summary.en: Instant sandboxed server environments for developers.
summary.zh: 為開發者提供即時沙盒化的伺服器環境。

highlight.en: StackMachine gave teams full-stack visibility into their codebases and developer environments, built by founders experienced with large-scale web services.
highlight.zh: StackMachine 讓團隊全面掌握程式碼庫與開發環境，創辦人具備大規模網路服務經驗。

summary.en: A platform where users vote on product designs and pre-order favorites at a discount.
summary.zh: 讓使用者票選產品設計並折扣預購心儀商品的平台。

highlight.en: Crowdery built each user a personalized marketplace of their top-voted product picks, opened for discounted pre-orders; it later became Clara (YC S14).
highlight.zh: Crowdery 依使用者票選結果打造個人化商品市集，並開放折扣預購，後轉型為 Clara（YC S14）。

summary.en: A mobile communications platform for teams running live events.
summary.zh: 為現場活動團隊打造的行動通訊平台。

highlight.en: GoComm gave distributed event crews real-time communication and task management on their existing mobile devices, like Yammer for mobile teams.
highlight.zh: GoComm 讓分散的活動團隊在現有行動裝置上即時溝通與管理任務，宛如行動團隊版的 Yammer。

summary.en: Real-time collaborative code editing inside native text editors.
summary.zh: 在原生文字編輯器中進行即時協作編程。

highlight.en: Floobits let developers pair-program in real time using their own native editors, with freemium pricing and paid private workspaces from $15 a month.
highlight.zh: Floobits 讓開發者用自己慣用的原生編輯器即時結對編程，採免費增值制，私人工作區月費自 15 美元起。

summary.en: An Amazon-style e-commerce marketplace for Latin America.
summary.zh: 為拉丁美洲打造的亞馬遜式電商市場平台。

highlight.en: Glio connected buyers and sellers across Latin America with low prices and strong customer service, billing itself as the region's first YC-backed company.
highlight.zh: Glio 以低價與優質客服連結拉美的買賣雙方，自稱為拉美首家 YC 支持的公司。

summary.en: Maker of distinctive iPhone cases and mobile accessories.
summary.zh: 設計獨特 iPhone 保護殼與行動配件的品牌。

highlight.en: Graft Concepts designed its Leverage case with an elegant clasp that secured the iPhone without brute force, preserving the device's original look.
highlight.zh: Graft Concepts 的 Leverage 保護殼採優雅卡扣設計，無需硬塞即可固定 iPhone，兼顧保護與原機美感。

summary.en: An online marketplace for buying, selling, and sharing printable 3D designs.
summary.zh: 買賣與分享可列印 3D 設計的線上市場平台。

highlight.en: Layer By Layer made it easy for anyone to find and print 3D products at home, and was acquired by MakerBot in February 2014.
highlight.zh: Layer By Layer 讓任何人都能輕鬆尋找並在家列印 3D 產品，於 2014 年 2 月被 MakerBot 收購。

summary.en: Web marketing and CRM tools for small businesses and merchant associations.
summary.zh: 為小型企業與商家協會提供的網路行銷與 CRM 工具。

highlight.en: LocalOn provided customer relationship management tools tailored to small businesses and merchant associations.
highlight.zh: LocalOn 為小型企業與商家協會量身打造客戶關係管理工具。

summary.en: Software analytics that record iOS app sessions as video.
summary.zh: 以影片紀錄 iOS 應用程式運作的軟體分析工具。

highlight.en: Watchsend recorded an app's full state into video to surface behaviors and actionable analytics, showing where problems are and how to fix them.
highlight.zh: Watchsend 將應用程式完整狀態錄成影片，呈現使用行為與可行分析，指出問題所在與修復方式。

summary.en: A remote monitoring and activity-tracking system for seniors.
summary.zh: 為長者打造的遠端監測與活動追蹤系統。

highlight.en: Amulyte gave seniors fall protection and coverage anywhere without a home base station, helping them keep their independence and age safely at home.
highlight.zh: Amulyte 讓長者不需家用基地台即可隨處獲得跌倒防護與覆蓋，協助他們維持獨立、安心在家終老。

summary.en: Canonical permalinks for songs across all major music services.
summary.zh: 橫跨各大音樂服務的歌曲標準永久連結。

highlight.en: Bop.fm aggregated Spotify, iTunes, YouTube, SoundCloud and more into one interface so users could play and share any song across different services.
highlight.zh: Bop.fm 將 Spotify、iTunes、YouTube、SoundCloud 等整合於單一介面，無論好友用哪種服務都能播放與分享同一首歌。

summary.en: Tablet-based ordering that replaces the paper restaurant menu.
summary.zh: 以平板點餐取代紙本菜單的餐廳系統。

highlight.en: Butter Systems let diners order food and drinks on demand from a tablet or their own phone, spurring impulse orders and speeding up table turnover.
highlight.zh: Butter Systems 讓顧客用平板或自己的手機隨時點餐，刺激衝動消費並加快翻桌速度。

summary.en: Personalized mobile audio products that help people hear better.
summary.zh: 協助人們聽得更清楚的個人化行動音訊產品。

highlight.en: SoundFocus tuned audio to each listener's hearing, launching the Amp case to give users sharper, personalized sound on their devices.
highlight.zh: SoundFocus 依每位聽者的聽力客製音訊，推出 Amp 保護殼，讓使用者在裝置上獲得更清晰的個人化聲音。

summary.en: Version control and collaboration for documents, like Git for docs.
summary.zh: 文件的版本控制與協作工具，宛如文件版 Git。

highlight.en: Kivo was a plugin that let people share edits and store document versions without ever leaving their editing app, such as PowerPoint.
highlight.zh: Kivo 是一款外掛，讓使用者無須離開 PowerPoint 等編輯程式即可分享編輯與儲存文件版本。

summary.en: An expressive, Android-based hackable robot companion for young children.
summary.zh: 為幼童打造、可程式化的 Android 表情機器人玩伴。

highlight.en: IXI-Play was a $299 robot that sees, hears, speaks and moves, mimicking emotions and supporting customizable skins and an app store for different characters.
highlight.zh: IXI-Play 是售價 299 美元的機器人，能看、聽、說、動並模擬情緒，支援可更換造型與角色應用商店。

summary.en: An Android lock screen that surfaces your most important notifications.
summary.zh: 為你呈現最重要通知的 Android 鎖定畫面。

highlight.en: Echo automatically sorted notifications into categories and pushed the most important alerts straight to the lock screen.
highlight.zh: Echo 自動將通知分類，並把最重要的提醒直接推送到鎖定畫面。

summary.en: FanHero is a consumer platform for creators and their fans.
summary.zh: FanHero 是連結創作者與粉絲的消費者平台。

highlight.en: FanHero operated in the consumer creator space, connecting fans with the people and content they follow.
highlight.zh: FanHero 經營消費者創作者領域，連結粉絲與他們關注的人物及內容。

summary.en: Affordable online bootcamps that teach people to code quickly.
summary.zh: 教人快速學會寫程式的平價線上訓練營。

highlight.en: One Month was an accelerated learning platform built to teach real-world skills like coding in a short amount of time.
highlight.zh: One Month 是一個加速學習平台，旨在於短時間內教授寫程式等實用技能。

summary.en: Banking APIs and developer platforms for banks worldwide.
summary.zh: 為全球銀行打造的銀行 API 與開發者平台。

highlight.en: Standard Treasury built white-labeled developer platforms that helped partner banks cut servicing costs and grow volumes; acquired by SVB in 2015.
highlight.zh: Standard Treasury 打造白標開發者平台，助合作銀行降低服務成本並提升交易量，2015 年被矽谷銀行收購。

summary.en: A developer- and user-friendly tool for in-app feedback.
summary.zh: 對開發者與使用者都友善的應用程式內回饋工具。

highlight.en: Audobox provided an in-app feedback tool designed to be easy for both developers to integrate and users to use.
highlight.zh: Audobox 提供應用程式內回饋工具，設計上兼顧開發者易於整合與使用者易於操作。

summary.en: The leading tool for communicating with users during downtime and incidents.
summary.zh: 在系統當機與事件期間與使用者溝通的領先工具。

highlight.en: Statuspage became the #1 status and incident communication tool and was acquired by Atlassian in 2016.
highlight.zh: Statuspage 成為頂尖的狀態與事件溝通工具，並於 2016 年被 Atlassian 收購。

summary.en: A tool that lets marketers modify their own website.
summary.zh: 讓行銷人員自行修改網站的工具。

highlight.en: WebCake gave marketing people a way to modify their website directly, without relying on developers.
highlight.zh: WebCake 讓行銷人員無須仰賴開發者，即可直接修改自家網站。

summary.en: Helps air passengers claim compensation for delayed, cancelled, or overbooked flights.
summary.zh: 協助旅客就航班延誤、取消或超賣申請賠償。

highlight.en: AirHelp makes the airline compensation claim process faster and easier for passengers hit by delayed, cancelled, and overbooked flights.
highlight.zh: AirHelp 讓遭遇航班延誤、取消與超賣的旅客，更快速輕鬆地完成向航空公司申請賠償的流程。

summary.en: Digital infrastructure and workflow tools for mortgage closings.
summary.zh: 為房貸交割打造的數位基礎建設與工作流程工具。

highlight.en: Snapdocs connects the many parties in real estate transactions to make mortgage closings more digital, online, and automated.
highlight.zh: Snapdocs 串接不動產交易中的眾多參與方，讓房貸交割更數位化、線上化且自動化。

summary.en: An engineering and design partner that helps startups build their products.
summary.zh: 協助新創打造產品的工程與設計夥伴。

highlight.en: Povio has delivered over 1,000 projects with a 200+ person team, partnering with 60+ YC founders and brands like Volkswagen and Flexport.
highlight.zh: Povio 以 200 多人的團隊交付逾 1,000 個專案，合作對象涵蓋 60 多位 YC 創辦人及 Volkswagen、Flexport 等品牌。

summary.en: On-demand access to English tutors over video chat, anytime.
summary.zh: 隨時透過視訊聊天即時連線英語家教。

highlight.en: Cambly gives English learners instant 1-on-1 video access to native speakers 24/7, while letting tutors earn money helping people worldwide practice.
highlight.zh: Cambly 讓英語學習者全天候即時一對一視訊連線母語人士，家教則可透過協助全球學員練習賺取收入。

summary.en: A global multi-brand beauty and personal care startup.
summary.zh: 全球性的多品牌美妝與個人護理新創。

highlight.en: MBX (formerly Memebox) co-develops K-beauty brands like Kaja and I Dew Care with partners such as Sephora and Ulta, using data to find market white space.
highlight.zh: MBX（前身 Memebox）與 Sephora、Ulta 等夥伴共同開發 Kaja、I Dew Care 等韓系美妝品牌，並以數據尋找市場空缺。

summary.en: Coaching and gamification software for sales teams.
summary.zh: 為業務團隊打造的教練與遊戲化軟體。

highlight.en: Ambition uses sales activity data to power coaching and gamification tools that help managers coach better and teams hit their numbers.
highlight.zh: Ambition 以業務活動數據驅動教練與遊戲化工具，協助主管更會帶人、團隊達成業績目標。

summary.en: A convenient, economical online marketplace for buying and selling used furniture.
summary.zh: 便利又划算的二手家具線上買賣市場。

highlight.en: Move Loot combined an online furniture marketplace with built-in delivery, making it easy to sell secondhand pieces and avoid buying new.
highlight.zh: Move Loot 將線上家具市場與內建配送結合，讓二手家具買賣更輕鬆，省去購買全新品的開銷。

summary.en: A patient engagement platform for low-income populations.
summary.zh: 為低收入族群打造的病患互動平台。

highlight.en: CareMessage is a tech nonprofit that has reached 20 million patients, combining messaging and data to improve health equity at scale.
highlight.zh: CareMessage 是一家科技非營利組織，已觸及 2,000 萬名病患，結合訊息與數據以大規模提升健康公平。

summary.en: A game that teaches computer science to middle and high school students.
summary.zh: 教導中學生電腦科學的遊戲。

highlight.en: CodeCombat teaches Python, JavaScript and more directly in the browser through gameplay, letting teachers with no CS background start in five minutes.
highlight.zh: CodeCombat 透過遊戲在瀏覽器中直接教授 Python、JavaScript 等語言，無資訊背景的老師五分鐘即可上手。

summary.en: Independent underwriting and capital management for consumer loans.
summary.zh: 消費性貸款的獨立核保與資金管理。

highlight.en: Theorem independently underwrites consumer loans originated by banks and lenders, using that analysis to manage institutional capital and securitize loans.
highlight.zh: Theorem 為銀行與放款機構承作的消費性貸款進行獨立核保，並據此管理機構資金與將貸款證券化。

summary.en: Real-time expense management that makes expense reports obsolete.
summary.zh: 讓費用報告成為過去的即時報支管理工具。

highlight.en: Abacus reimburses teams and reconciles corporate cards in real time, auto-matching transactions and syncing with accounting software for easy bookkeeping.
highlight.zh: Abacus 即時為團隊報支並對帳公司卡，自動比對交易並同步會計軟體，讓記帳零負擔。

summary.en: AI super-apps platform for everyday tasks, anytime.
summary.zh: 打造日常隨用 AI 超級應用程式的平台。

highlight.en: MixerBox's apps have surpassed 300 million downloads, spanning alarms, news, an AI browser, payments, free TV and meditation in one daily-essential platform.
highlight.zh: MixerBox 的應用程式下載量已超過 3 億次，於單一日常平台涵蓋鬧鐘、新聞、AI 瀏覽器、支付、免費電視與冥想。

summary.en: Technology that lets li-ion batteries charge ultra fast without shortening their life.
summary.zh: 讓鋰電池超快充電又不犧牲壽命的技術。

highlight.en: GBatteries uses smart control algorithms to charge li-ion batteries extremely fast while retaining long cycle life.
highlight.zh: GBatteries 運用智慧控制演算法，讓鋰電池超快充電的同時維持長循環壽命。

summary.en: Real-time call verification that improves customer experience and fights phone fraud.
summary.zh: 即時電話驗證，提升客戶體驗並防範電話詐騙。

highlight.en: Next Caller's VeriCall verifies legitimate callers and flags spoofed, high-risk calls within milliseconds of the first ring, fighting fraudsters not customers.
highlight.zh: Next Caller 的 VeriCall 在第一聲鈴響的毫秒間驗證合法來電並標記偽冒高風險來電，鎖定詐騙者而非顧客。

summary.en: Helps businesses find the best locations to grow.
summary.zh: 協助企業找出最佳展店地點。

highlight.en: PiinPoint's SaaS centralizes datasets like traffic, demographics, and available commercial real estate so businesses can quickly validate where to expand.
highlight.zh: PiinPoint 的 SaaS 整合車流、人口統計與可用商用不動產等資料，讓企業快速驗證最佳擴張地點。

summary.en: An always-ready, on-demand design team and operating system for creative agencies.
summary.zh: 隨時待命的隨需設計團隊與創意公司作業系統。

highlight.en: SketchDeck gave teams 24/7 access to high-quality, on-brand design for marketing, sales and communications at the scale and speed modern teams demand.
highlight.zh: SketchDeck 讓團隊全天候取得高品質、符合品牌的行銷、銷售與溝通設計，滿足現代團隊對規模與速度的需求。

summary.en: AI-powered platform for producing on-brand transactional email fast.
summary.zh: 以 AI 快速產出符合品牌的交易型電子郵件平台。

highlight.en: Dyspatch uses AI to generate, localize across 300+ locales, and publish transactional email so teams can ship polished emails without touching code.
highlight.zh: Dyspatch 以 AI 生成內容、跨 300 多種語系在地化並發布交易型郵件，讓團隊無須寫程式即可發出精緻郵件。

summary.en: A nonprofit that helps low-income families find the resources they need.
summary.zh: 協助低收入家庭尋找所需資源的非營利組織。

highlight.en: One Degree's web and mobile platform helps low-income families and their case managers find, manage, and review nonprofit and government services.
highlight.zh: One Degree 的網頁與行動平台協助低收入家庭及其個案管理員尋找、管理與評價非營利與政府服務。

summary.en: Automates the chargeback dispute process for businesses.
summary.zh: 為企業自動化處理退單爭議流程。

highlight.en: With one integration, Chargehound automatically creates and submits customized dispute responses the moment a chargeback arrives; acquired by PayPal.
highlight.zh: 只需一次整合，Chargehound 便能在退單發生時自動建立並提交客製化爭議回應；後被 PayPal 收購。

summary.en: Advertising platform tools for marketplace sellers.
summary.zh: 為市場平台賣家打造的廣告平台工具。

highlight.en: Boostable made advertising easy for sellers and brands on marketplaces, helping them promote their listings and gather insights to grow.
highlight.zh: Boostable 讓市場平台上的賣家與品牌輕鬆投放廣告，協助推廣商品並蒐集洞察以成長。

summary.en: An e-commerce gateway connecting retailers to apps that want to sell their products.
summary.zh: 連結零售商與想銷售其商品之應用程式的電商閘道。

highlight.en: Two Tap let shoppers buy from retailers directly inside apps across all devices via a single API, with a guarantee to never lose an order.
highlight.zh: Two Tap 透過單一 API 讓消費者跨裝置直接在應用程式內向零售商下單，並保證絕不遺漏訂單。

summary.en: Turn any website into a structured API from your browser in seconds.
summary.zh: 幾秒內從瀏覽器把任何網站變成結構化 API。

highlight.en: Kimono Labs' bookmarklet and Chrome extension let users scrape and crawl websites to build structured APIs with no programming required.
highlight.zh: Kimono Labs 的書籤工具與 Chrome 擴充功能讓使用者無須寫程式即可爬取網站並建立結構化 API。

summary.en: A smart front-door camera and intercom built into an outdoor light.
summary.zh: 內建於戶外燈具的智慧前門攝影機與對講機。

highlight.en: Kuna detects people at your door and lets you see and talk to them via smartphone, installing as easily as replacing a light fixture to prevent break-ins.
highlight.zh: Kuna 偵測門口人員，讓你透過手機查看並對話，安裝如更換燈具般簡單，藉此預防闖空門。

summary.en: Transparent, animated, interactive mobile ads.
summary.zh: 透明、動態且具互動性的行動廣告。

highlight.en: Motionlead's ads layer transparent, animated, interactive content on top of native and web apps without interrupting the user's navigation.
highlight.zh: Motionlead 的廣告以透明、動態的互動內容疊加於原生與網頁應用之上，且不打斷使用者瀏覽。

summary.en: Messaging that lets you chat without interrupting what you're doing.
summary.zh: 讓你不中斷手邊工作即可聊天的訊息應用。

highlight.en: HoverChat made Android messaging a multi-tasking experience, letting users chat without breaking their workflow.
highlight.zh: HoverChat 讓 Android 訊息成為多工體驗，使用者聊天時不必中斷工作流程。

summary.en: Machine-learning personalization for websites and mobile apps in real time.
summary.zh: 為網站與行動應用提供即時機器學習個人化。

highlight.en: LiftIgniter's machine learning puts the perfect content in front of each user in real time, averaging 50% gains in click-through and engagement with no tags.
highlight.zh: LiftIgniter 的機器學習即時為每位使用者呈現最合適的內容，無需標籤即平均提升 50% 點擊率與互動。

summary.en: Same-day local delivery via API, operating in San Francisco.
summary.zh: 以 API 提供當日本地配送，於舊金山營運。

highlight.en: Rickshaw partnered with courier companies to deliver goods like laundry and meals, using algorithms and apps to dispatch, route, and track on demand.
highlight.zh: Rickshaw 與快遞業者合作配送洗衣、餐點等貨物，以演算法與應用程式進行隨需派遣、路徑規劃與追蹤。

summary.en: Weekly aerial imagery for agriculture, like a real-time Google Earth.
summary.zh: 為農業提供每週空拍影像，宛如即時 Google Earth。

highlight.en: TerrAvion became the largest-volume provider of high-revisit aerial imagery, beating satellites and drones on cost, resolution, and reliability for farms.
highlight.zh: TerrAvion 成為高重訪率空拍影像的最大供應商，在成本、解析度與可靠度上勝過衛星與無人機，助農業決策。

summary.en: An API that makes it easy for developers to build apps you can talk to.
summary.zh: 讓開發者輕鬆打造可語音對話應用的 API。

highlight.en: Wit.ai turns natural language speech or text into commands for any app or device, and was acquired by Facebook after being funded by Andreessen Horowitz.
highlight.zh: Wit.ai 將自然語言語音或文字轉為任何應用或裝置的指令，曾獲 Andreessen Horowitz 投資，後被 Facebook 收購。

summary.en: AR and simulation software that simulates clothes on your body.
summary.zh: 在你身上模擬服裝穿著的 AR 與模擬軟體。

highlight.en: Avametric built AR and simulation tools for virtual fitting rooms and automated content creation, aiming to transform how people shop and design clothing.
highlight.zh: Avametric 打造虛擬試衣間與自動化內容生成的 AR 與模擬工具，志在改變人們選購與設計服裝的方式。

summary.en: A nonprofit developing a free HIV vaccine.
summary.zh: 研發免費 HIV 疫苗的非營利組織。

highlight.en: Immunity Project aimed to give the world a free HIV vaccine that grants the same protection as natural HIV controllers, with success in clinical trials.
highlight.zh: Immunity Project 致力打造免費 HIV 疫苗，賦予如天然 HIV 控制者般的保護力，並期望在臨床試驗成功後免費提供全球。

summary.en: Engineering and programming education for kids aged 6 to 12.
summary.zh: 為 6 至 12 歲兒童設計的工程與程式教育。

highlight.en: FutureLeague teaches kids engineering and programming through hands-on projects with a belt-style leveling system, plus corporate team-building events.
highlight.zh: FutureLeague 透過實作專案搭配類似武術段位的升級制度教孩子工程與程式，並舉辦企業團隊建立活動。

summary.en: A programmable commerce API powering online purchases at scale.
summary.zh: 驅動大規模線上購買的可程式化商務 API。

highlight.en: Zinc's API already enables tens of thousands of transactions a month, building the purchasing layer for a world where any online buy can be automated.
highlight.zh: Zinc 的 API 每月已支援數萬筆交易，正打造讓任何線上購買皆可自動化的採購層基礎建設。

summary.en: Tools that help media companies make quality live video.
summary.zh: 協助媒體公司製作高品質直播影片的工具。

highlight.en: Media companies, brands and celebrities used Vidpresso for high-quality live videos on Facebook Live and Twitter; it was acquired by Facebook in 2018.
highlight.zh: 媒體公司、品牌與名人以 Vidpresso 在 Facebook Live 與 Twitter 製作高品質直播，2018 年被 Facebook 收購。

summary.en: Email built for wellness.
summary.zh: 為身心健康打造的電子郵件。

highlight.en: Emailio offers an email experience designed around wellness rather than constant interruption.
highlight.zh: Emailio 提供以身心健康為核心、而非不斷打擾使用者的電子郵件體驗。

summary.en: Find and book tickets to great urban culture events in the UK.
summary.zh: 在英國尋找並訂購精彩都會文化活動門票。

highlight.en: Shoobs is the leading UK destination to discover and book urban culture events like hip hop concerts and RnB club nights, helping organizers sell out fast.
highlight.zh: Shoobs 是英國探索並訂購嘻哈演唱會、RnB 夜店等都會文化活動的領先平台，助主辦方迅速售罄。

summary.en: Easily and automatically share almost anything between your devices.
summary.zh: 在你的各裝置間輕鬆且自動分享幾乎所有內容。

highlight.en: Pushbullet bridges your phone, tablet, and computer, making it easy and automatic to share links, files, and data between them.
highlight.zh: Pushbullet 串接你的手機、平板與電腦，讓連結、檔案與資料在裝置間輕鬆且自動地分享。

summary.en: Mobile keyboards and emoji powered by deep learning; makers of Dango.
summary.zh: 以深度學習驅動的行動鍵盤與表情符號，Dango 的開發者。

highlight.en: Whirlscape combined human-computer interaction with machine learning to build Dango, a deep-learning tool for keyboards and emoji.
highlight.zh: Whirlscape 結合人機互動與機器學習打造 Dango，一款用於鍵盤與表情符號的深度學習工具。

summary.en: Free, hassle-free video calling.
summary.zh: 免費且無負擔的視訊通話。

highlight.en: Awesometalk focused on simple, free video calling with no logins or passwords, sparing users the 'add me on Skype' dance.
highlight.zh: Awesometalk 專注於簡單、免費的視訊通話，免登入免密碼，省去「加我 Skype」的麻煩。

summary.en: A nonprofit diversifying the pipeline of students entering tech.
summary.zh: 為科技業培育多元學生人才的非營利組織。

highlight.en: CodeNow is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit that turns high schoolers into coders, designers, and product managers by helping them solve community problems with software.
highlight.zh: CodeNow 是 501(c)(3) 非營利組織，協助高中生以軟體解決社區問題，培養成程式設計師、設計師與產品經理。

summary.en: Mailing list management that makes group email less noisy and more actionable.
summary.zh: 讓群組郵件更安靜、更可行動的郵件清單管理。

highlight.en: Threadable was a mailing list solution that cut down on group-email noise and made conversations more actionable.
highlight.zh: Threadable 是一套郵件清單解決方案，減少群組郵件的雜訊並讓討論更具行動性。

summary.en: In-person matchmaking meets group dating, with matchmakers doing the work.
summary.zh: 真人媒合結合團體約會，由媒人為你安排。

highlight.en: Dating Ring used real matchmakers to arrange high-quality group dates that members could book on their schedule, launching in NYC and SF.
highlight.zh: Dating Ring 由真人媒人安排高品質團體約會，會員可依自己時間預約，於紐約與舊金山推出。

summary.en: A device and app to track and monitor your car.
summary.zh: 追蹤與監控你愛車的裝置與應用程式。

highlight.en: Drive Pulse plugs into a car's OBD-II port and uses cellular data to keep the vehicle connected, giving owners peace of mind when they can't be there.
highlight.zh: Drive Pulse 插入車輛 OBD-II 埠並透過行動數據保持連線，讓車主不在場時也能安心。

summary.en: Fee-free, mobile-first event ticketing.
summary.zh: 零手續費、行動優先的活動售票。

highlight.en: Eventjoy let organizers worldwide plan everything from conferences to happy hours, with mobile-first technology that enhances the event-day experience.
highlight.zh: Eventjoy 讓全球主辦方規劃從研討會到歡樂時光的各式活動，以行動優先技術提升活動當日體驗。

summary.en: Functional, high-quality materials for 3D printing.
summary.zh: 用於 3D 列印的高品質功能性材料。

highlight.en: MadeSolid was a hardware company whose chemists and engineers developed functional materials for 3D-manufacturing real products.
highlight.zh: MadeSolid 是一家硬體公司，其化學家與工程師開發可用於 3D 製造實際產品的功能性材料。

summary.en: Lead intelligence as a service that automatically researches sales leads.
summary.zh: 自動研究銷售線索的線索情報服務。

highlight.en: StackLead turns just an email address into a full research report on a lead, with Salesforce integration and a webhooks API so reps can tailor their outreach.
highlight.zh: StackLead 僅憑一個電子郵件地址即產出完整的線索研究報告，並提供 Salesforce 整合與 webhook API，助業務客製化開發。

summary.en: An open-source PostgreSQL extension for time-series data analytics.
summary.zh: 用於時序資料分析的開源 PostgreSQL 擴充功能。

highlight.en: PipelineDB continuously aggregates large streams of time-series data into summary data, shining at scale for real-time reporting dashboards.
highlight.zh: PipelineDB 持續將大量時序資料串流彙整為摘要資料，在大規模即時報表儀表板情境中表現尤為出色。

summary.en: A smart garden system, like a Nest for lawn and garden.
summary.zh: 智慧園藝系統，宛如草坪與花園版的 Nest。

highlight.en: Edyn's soil sensor analyzes weather and soil conditions, pushing alerts and controlling a water valve to water plants only when needed.
highlight.zh: Edyn 的土壤感測器分析天氣與土壤狀況，推送提醒並控制水閥，只在需要時為植物澆水。

summary.en: A marketplace for renting luxury fashion.
summary.zh: 租借精品時尚的市場平台。

highlight.en: Style Lend let members monetize their closets by listing luxury items on its app and website for others to rent over a 7-day period.
highlight.zh: Style Lend 讓會員透過在其應用程式與網站刊登精品，供他人以 7 天為期租借，藉此活化自家衣櫥。

summary.en: An angel investing platform that makes fundraising more efficient.
summary.zh: 讓募資更有效率的天使投資平台。

highlight.en: Unicorn.ly helped angel investors collaborate to source, evaluate, mentor, and invest in the most promising startups.
highlight.zh: Unicorn.ly 協助天使投資人協作，共同尋找、評估、輔導並投資最具潛力的新創。

summary.en: Wireless toy game controllers for mobile games.
summary.zh: 用於手機遊戲的無線玩具遊戲控制器。

highlight.en: ZowPow made wireless toy game controllers designed for playing mobile games.
highlight.zh: ZowPow 製作專為手機遊戲設計的無線玩具遊戲控制器。

summary.en: Instant access to top software experts via video chat.
summary.zh: 透過視訊聊天即時連線頂尖軟體專家。

highlight.en: AirPair paired your engineers with expert mentors in real time over video and screen sharing, accelerating development across many technology stacks.
highlight.zh: AirPair 透過視訊與螢幕分享即時將你的工程師與專家導師配對，加速跨多種技術堆疊的開發。

summary.en: Predictive analytics that forecast user churn for enterprises.
summary.zh: 為企業預測使用者流失的預測分析。

highlight.en: Framed Data used machine learning to predict when and why users would churn, aiming to democratize data science; acquired by Block in 2016.
highlight.zh: Framed Data 運用機器學習預測使用者流失的時機與原因，志在普及資料科學，2016 年被 Block 收購。

summary.en: Virtual activities and experiences for remote teams.
summary.zh: 為遠端團隊提供的虛擬活動與體驗。

highlight.en: MerryMint helped teams discover and book virtual activities led by expert guides that they could do together from home.
highlight.zh: MerryMint 協助團隊探索並預訂由專家帶領的虛擬活動，讓成員在家中一起參與。

summary.en: A next-generation home shopping network.
summary.zh: 新世代的居家購物頻道。

highlight.en: Shopagram set out to reinvent the home shopping network for a new generation of online shoppers.
highlight.zh: Shopagram 旨在為新世代線上購物者重新打造居家購物頻道。

summary.en: Direct peer-to-peer lending across the international wealth divide.
summary.zh: 跨越國際貧富差距的直接點對點借貸。

highlight.en: Zidisha is the first direct P2P lending service letting people worldwide lend to and message borrowers in developing countries without local intermediaries.
highlight.zh: Zidisha 是首個直接點對點借貸服務，讓全球個人無須當地中間人即可借款給開發中國家的借款人並與其交流。

summary.en: An end-to-end analytics stack for omnichannel retailers and brands.
summary.zh: 為全通路零售商與品牌打造的端到端分析平台。

highlight.en: 42 unifies stores, e-commerce and wholesale data into hundreds of built-in metrics, handling hosting and integrations so brands get real-time insights.
highlight.zh: 42 將門市、電商與批發資料整合為數百項內建指標，並包辦託管與整合，讓品牌即時取得洞察。

summary.en: The easiest way to buy and sell quality used furniture.
summary.zh: 買賣優質二手家具最輕鬆的方式。

highlight.en: AptDeco is a peer-to-peer managed marketplace offering a verified community, pre-arranged pickup and delivery, and secure payments for used furniture.
highlight.zh: AptDeco 是一個受管理的點對點市場，為二手家具提供經驗證的社群、預約取送與安全付款。

summary.en: Self-checkout micro-markets that replace office vending machines.
summary.zh: 取代辦公室自動販賣機的自助結帳微型超市。

highlight.en: Yumbin replaces clunky vending machines with mobile POS self-checkout markets of healthy snacks, targeting the stagnant $43 billion vending industry.
highlight.zh: Yumbin 以行動 POS 自助結帳的健康零食微型超市取代笨重的販賣機，瞄準停滯的 430 億美元販賣機產業。

summary.en: Privacy software that helps small businesses comply with data laws.
summary.zh: 協助小型企業遵循資料法規的隱私軟體。

highlight.en: TrueVault builds software that makes getting and staying compliant with consumer data privacy laws simple, straightforward, and fully automated for SMBs.
highlight.zh: TrueVault 打造軟體，讓中小企業簡單、直接且全自動地達成並維持消費者資料隱私法規的合規。

summary.en: Helps K-12 teachers and administrators build great curricula.
summary.zh: 協助 K-12 教師與行政人員建立優質課程。

highlight.en: OpenCurriculum is a tech nonprofit offering a free, community-curated library of teaching and learning materials for K-12 educators worldwide.
highlight.zh: OpenCurriculum 是一家科技非營利組織，為全球 K-12 教育者提供免費、由社群策展的教學與學習素材庫。

summary.en: A collaborative customer communication hub for building strong relationships.
summary.zh: 打造穩固關係的協作式客戶溝通中樞。

highlight.en: Front brings email and apps together so teams can scale personalized customer conversations; over 8,000 businesses use it, backed by Sequoia and Salesforce.
highlight.zh: Front 整合電子郵件與應用程式，讓團隊大規模經營個人化客戶對話，逾 8,000 家企業採用，獲 Sequoia 與 Salesforce Ventures 支持。

summary.en: Rebuilding advertising data infrastructure to protect privacy.
summary.zh: 重建廣告資料基礎建設以保護隱私。

highlight.en: As cookies disappear, Permutive rebuilds ad-tech around privacy-safe cohorts by moving data processing off the cloud and onto the user's own device.
highlight.zh: 隨著 cookie 消失，Permutive 將資料處理從雲端移至使用者裝置，圍繞隱私安全的群組重建廣告技術。
